title: Add proposal linkage summaries to native component and view inspectors
summary: Deepen proposal artifact read-back in the native content workspace by surfacing truthful proposal linkage summaries directly inside component and view detail inspectors.
acceptance_criteria: Component detail inspector shows a proposal linkage summary for the matching component scope.
View detail inspector shows a proposal linkage summary for the matching view scope.
The linkage summary reuses existing native proposal artifact truth such as ready state, evidence match, linked tickets, and apply-preview readiness.
The macOS build still passes after the inspector updates.
Patch hygiene and ticket validation pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Patch hygiene passed after adding proposal linkage summaries to the native content inspectors.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after adding proposal linkage summaries and shared artifact readiness helpers.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 follow-up to deepen proposal artifact linkage beyond review-focus surfaces.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: This slice intentionally reuses existing proposal artifact parsing and validation surfaces instead of inventing a second artifact model.
The goal is truthful inspector context, not write-back or proposal mutation.
